/usr/bin/c++ -g -lzstd -L/usr/lib/llvm-19/lib -L/home/curless/workspace/pl11/build-llvm/lib -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pl11c.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/pl11c.dir/src/lexer/pl11_lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pl11c.dir/src/parser/pl11_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pl11c.dir/src/sema/pl11_sema.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pl11c.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pl11c.dir/src/codegen/pl11_codegen.cpp.o -o pl11c  -lLLVM-19
